news.t: GraniteShares Announces Monthly Distributions for its Autocallable ETFs: ANV, TLA, MSR, ATC, PLA, AHD, SCA and MRA
GraniteShares Expands Autocallable ETFs Lineup Focused on AI and Crypto Equities

overview.description: The GraniteShares Autocallable SMCI ETF (SCA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, investing in a laddered portfolio of single-stock autocallable options referencing the price of Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) SCA was launched on May 27, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Monthly Distributions for its Autocallable ETFs: ANV, TLA, MSR, ATC, PLA, AHD, SCA and MRA
data.text: New York, July 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the monthly distributions for its GraniteShares Autocallable ETFs: ANV, TLA, MSR, ATC, PLA, AHD, SCA and MRA as shown in the t...

data.title: GraniteShares Expands Autocallable ETFs Lineup Focused on AI and Crypto Equities
data.text: SCA and MRA join GraniteShares' growing autocallable ETF platform, bringing structured income strategies to two of the market's most volatile high-conviction stocks
